languages.text: [Обратиться к свите предка] "Себериана я, может быть, и пощажу — а вот вас казнят как чернь".
[Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к свите предка] "Себериана я, может быть, и пощажу — а вот вас казнят как чернь".

languages.text: 【对你先祖的随从说】“我或许可以饶塞贝里安本人一命，但你们将像普通暴民一样被处决。”
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: 【对你先祖的随从说】“我或许可以饶塞贝里安本人一命，但你们将像普通暴民一样被处决。”

languages.text: [Dirigirte al séquito de tu antepasado] «Aunque tal vez perdone la vida de Seberian, los demás serán ejecutados como chusma corriente».
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte al séquito de tu antepasado] «Aunque tal vez perdone la vida de Seberian, los demás serán ejecutados como chusma corriente».

languages.text: [Vous adresser à l'entourage de votre aïeul] « Il se peut que j'épargne Seberian, mais vous serez exécutés sans autre forme de procès. »
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: [Vous adresser à l'entourage de votre aïeul] « Il se peut que j'épargne Seberian, mais vous serez exécutés sans autre forme de procès. »

languages.text: [Atanın maiyetine seslen] "Seberian'ın kendisini bağışlayabilirim ama sizler, sıradan bir ayaktakımı gibi idam edileceksiniz."
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: [Atanın maiyetine seslen] "Seberian'ın kendisini bağışlayabilirim ama sizler, sıradan bir ayaktakımı gibi idam edileceksiniz."

languages.text: [Gefolge deines Ahnherren ansprechen] "Vielleicht verschone ich Seberian, aber Ihr werdet wie gewöhnliches Gesindel hingerichtet."
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: [Gefolge deines Ahnherren ansprechen] "Vielleicht verschone ich Seberian, aber Ihr werdet wie gewöhnliches Gesindel hingerichtet."

languages.text: 祖先側の側近に「シベリアは助けてやるかもしれないが、お前らは烏合の衆として処刑される」
languages.original_text: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."

traits.locale_text: 祖先側の側近に「シベリアは助けてやるかもしれないが、お前らは烏合の衆として処刑される」
